# AI-Assistant Banner Comments

**Severity:** INFO
**Real evidence:**
- Cursor sometimes inserts `// Generated by Cursor` headers.
- Claude Code occasionally writes `# Claude did this` or `# AI-assisted` when asked.
- Some teams require `// @ai-generated` tags per their code-review policy.

## Bug

Not a bug per se — but you want to know which files are AI-heavy so they get extra review attention.

```ts
// Generated by Cursor on 2026-04-12
export function compile(x: string) { /* ... */ }
```

## Fix

No action needed. Informational only.

## Detection rule

Regex on the first 30 lines of source files:

```
//\s*generated\s+by\s+(?:cursor|claude|copilot|chatgpt|gpt-?\d)
#\s*generated\s+by\s+(?:cursor|claude|copilot|chatgpt|gpt-?\d)
//\s*claude\s+(?:did|wrote|generated)
//\s*AI-assisted
//\s*@ai-generated
```

## False positives

None notable. This is a marker, not a defect.
